title: RUSTY Review Round 3: full project
notes:
Idiom rating: ACCEPTABLE — code is well-structured and mostly idiomatic Rust; the main open concerns (duplicate walks, eval-time cache key allocations, read_test_stmt duplication) are pre-existing tracked issues, not new regressions.
Confidence: 85% chance of missed issue. Least confident: (1) bare_address rfind/find interaction with pathological comment+angle-bracket inputs, (2) check_extension_use coverage of nested allof/anyof containing extension tests — exercised only by manual trace, no dedicated test. Uncertainty: no runtime execution; all analysis was static read-through.
